thAnalysis.title: Time-History Response Analysis
thAnalysis.description: Proceed through ground-motion loading, input checks, analysis, and result review.

analysis.label: Analysis conditions
analysis.description: Set time step, duration, and damping

thAnalysis.noLatestResult: Maximum responses and occurrence times appear here after analysis.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.lead: Time-history response analysis shows displacement, velocity, and acceleration over time under ground motion.
intro.help: Proceed through the steps on the left. Model, support, and mass data are read from the preceding screens.

inputCheck.heading: Input check
inputCheck.description: Confirmed model data is read-only. Only analysis-specific settings can be changed in this guide.

supplement.model: Nodes and members are managed on the model input screen.
supplement.support: Support conditions are managed on the model input screen.
supplement.mass: The analysis uses the mass cases defined previously.
supplement.groundMotion: Review the ground motion and its unit.
supplement.timeStep: Matching the ground-motion time step is recommended.
supplement.duration: Set a duration that does not exceed the motion length.
supplement.animation: Available display modes depend on result displacement components.

analysisConfig.heading: Analysis conditions
analysisConfig.description: Review required inputs, time settings, damping, and fixed integration parameters.
analysisConfig.timeStepWarning: Analysis dt differs from the ground-motion dt.
analysisConfig.durationError: Analysis duration exceeds the ground-motion length.
analysisConfig.saved: Inputs are stored in the project.

results.displayTargetsHelp: The full model has already been analyzed. This filter only changes the displayed results.

chart.heading: Time-history chart
chart.empty: Select response keys and quantities to display.
chart.legendHelp: Click a legend item to toggle its series.
